global_description: A small, slender songbird with a rounded body and a predominantly bright yellow plumage. It features olive-green wings and tail, with subtle streaks of reddish-brown on the chest. The bird has a short, pointed beak and dark eyes.

part_details.plumage: Bright yellow overall with olive-green on wings and tail.
part_details.wings: Olive-green, blending with the yellow body.

spatial_relations: The olive-green wings are attached to the sides of the yellow body.
The tail extends from the rear of the body.
The reddish-brown streaks are located on the chest.
The beak protrudes from the front of the head.
